content:
# Experience Timeline

## General Systems Ventures
**AI Consultant**  
Los Angeles / Remote · November 2025 to Present

- Advises clients on AI strategy, implementation, and automation
- Builds agentic workflows and LLM-enabled systems
- Bridges product thinking with practical delivery

## xAI
**Human Data Specialist / AI Trainer**  
Remote · August 2024 to November 2025

- Worked on data quality, labeling, and evaluation for model improvement
- Contributed to training workflows and tooling feedback
- Hands-on exposure to how production AI systems improve over time

## Leaf Group / Society6
**Software Engineer**  
Santa Monica · November 2018 to March 2023

- Migrated product surfaces from legacy PHP to React
- Rebuilt the Society6 Artist Studio
- Improved conversion and internal publishing workflows

## iROKOtv
**Frontend Developer**  
New York · March 2016 to May 2018

- Rebuilt the customer-facing frontend in React
- Worked on experimentation, subscription UX, and performance

## Datadog
**Web Developer / Designer**  
New York · January 2015 to March 2016

- Led a major website rebuild
- Worked closely with leadership on design and launch execution

There is earlier experience as well, but this thread covers the clearest through-line: **frontend depth, product rebuilds, and now AI implementation work**.
